response.justification: Nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in recent production roles — plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which directly matches the role's rarest requirement. Deep testing culture (TDD, test-library author, testing workshops) and cloud/container experience round out the profile; the main gaps are the absence of Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically, though adjacent experience makes these low-risk.
strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience in recent production roles
Current AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated
Significant career time in niche DLang ecosystem rather than the role's stack
